context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 complete. All features working: (1) Extension file checks verified: picker.js exposes __TC_openPicker, manifest.json content_scripts injects ['lib/selector.js', 'lib/picker.js', 'content.js'], content.js has pickMode/isInsidePicker/__TC_openPicker, background.js has TC_SET_PICK_MODE/setPickMode/setAssertMode. (2) Frontend /popup: ASSERT MODE and PICK ASSERTION toggles present and mutually exclusive, live sandbox picker works (click element opens AddAssertionModal, save captures assertion to list), Alt+Click opens picker without pick mode. (3) Frontend /: 'Granular assertion control' feature tile renders. (4) Frontend /dashboard regression: 10 timeline steps, 3-tab inspector, 4 framework tabs, AI Regenerate with Claude, Download, framework switching, inspector toggle all working. (5) Backend: all 18 tests pass including new valueEquals assertion test (toHaveValue for Playwright, should('have.value') for Cypress).
